fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontArguments` groups the parameters that control how a typeface is cloned
or customized: the font collection index, the variation design position,
the color palette index, and any palette color overrides. Pass an
`SKFontArguments` value to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone*> to obtain a new
typeface reflecting those settings.

## Examples

```csharp
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    CollectionIndex = 0,
    PaletteIndex = 1,
    VariationDesignPosition = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
    {
        new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate { Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wght"), Value = 700 },
    },
};
using var modified = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies arguments used to create a modified typeface from an existing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" />.
Gets or sets the zero-based index of the typeface within a font collection.
fields.value: The collection index. The default value is 0.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the color palette to use.
fields.value: The palette index. The default value is 0.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the color overrides to apply to the selected palette.
fields.value: A span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> values that replace individual palette entries.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the variation design position coordinates.
fields.value: A span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying each axis and its value.
